signIn.title: Account
signIn.subtitle: Log in or register to access your services

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Register to access your services
register.twoFactor: I want two-factor authentication to connect (recommended)
register.newsletter: I agree to receive the newsletter and updates
register.professionalNoticeText: Professional accounts require verification before activation. After registration, our team will review your information and approve your account within 1-2 business days.

pending.title: Registration Submitted!
pending.subtitle: Thank you for registering as a professional. Your account is pending verification.
pending.step1: You will receive a confirmation email with your registration details.
pending.step2: Our team will review your information within 1-2 business days.
pending.step3: Once approved, you will receive an email to activate your account and start posting properties.
pending.contact: Contact our support team at support@immobilier.ch if you have any questions about the verification process.
pending.footerNote: Already a member and need help? Contact our support team for assistance.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Please enter the e-mail address of your user account. A link to change your password will be sent directly to you.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a password reset link shortly.

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.description: Create alerts to be informed about new properties that match your criteria.

preEstimates.title: Pre-estimates
preEstimates.description: Your property pre-estimates are saved in your account and updated regularly.

files.title: Files
files.description: Save your property documents to show owners your seriousness as a tenant.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Save properties you like in your favorites and compare them easily.

consultations.title: Latest consultations
consultations.description: Find your recently viewed properties with a single click.
